_comment: Per-class approval policies and override mechanisms.

read.description: Always allowed; no confirmation or prompt required.

mutate.description: Prompt the user when running inside a sub-agent; auto-approved when running as the main agent.

destructive.description: Always require explicit user confirmation before executing, regardless of agent context.

external_write.description: Check the per-platform policy file under platform-policies/<platform>.json. Falls back to CONFIRM if no platform policy exists.

financial.description: Auto-approved for transactions strictly under the threshold; CONFIRM required at or above.

session_key_overrides._comment: Per-session keys can relax or tighten policies for the duration of a session. Keys are set in the session environment or passed via --session-key CLI flag.

<risk_class>.expires_at: ISO-8601 datetime or null for session-scoped

session_key_overrides.precedence: session_key_overrides take priority over class defaults but NOT over destructive class hardcoded confirm.
